name: Three Cheese Chicken Breasts in Tomato Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Butter a 13x9x2 inch glass baking dish.
3. Heat oil in a heavy large skillet over high heat.
4. Season chicken with salt and pepper.
5. Add chicken to the skillet; sauté until the outside is white, about 1 minute per side. Transfer to a plate.
6. Add onion, garlic, and oregano to the skillet and sauté until the onion begins to soften, about 4 minutes.
7. Add tomato sauce, stewed tomatoes with their juices, wine, and bay leaves to the skillet and cook until the sauce thickens, breaking up tomatoes with a spoon, about 8 minutes. Discard bay leaves.
8. Line the prepared dish with penne pasta.
9. Arrange chicken over the pasta.
10. Spoon sauce over everything, covering the chicken and pasta completely.
11. Mix cheeses in a small bowl.
12. Sprinkle the mixed cheeses over the sauce.
13. Bake until the chicken is just cooked through and the sauce bubbles, about 20 minutes.
